Speaking

Invite me to speak

I speak at conferences, workshops, and team offsites on AI adoption, systems thinking, organizational agility, and product development. I've been doing it since 2004 and still find it worthwhile.

Topics

  • AI pipelines and organizational readiness
  • Change management and AI adoption
  • Kanban and flow-based methods
  • Decision-making systems and feedback loops
  • Agile at scale in government and enterprise
  • Managing technical debt
  • Customer discovery and product analysis

Selected talks

Kanban University Central Europe, Hamburg, Germany

Agile 2017 National Conference, Orlando, FL

Managing Technical Debt Using A Kanban System

Department of Homeland Security, Washington, D.C.

Washington D.C. Business Agility Meetup, Washington, D.C.

Kanban University Global Summit, Alexandria, VA

Full history

  • Getting to Yes using the Kanban Method Department of Homeland Security, Washington, D.C.

Get in touch

If you'd like to invite me to speak, send an email with some details about the event, audience, and topic you have in mind.
